notes: Primary spec sources: Atlona product page (atlona.com/product/sw-510w/) and ManualsLib user manual (manual/1591888). The device has 5 inputs: USB-C (input 1), DisplayPort (input 2), HDMI 3, HDMI 4, and a 5th wireless BYOD input (no physical connector). HDMI version confirmed as 2.0 (18 Gbps) from multiple sources. LAN speed confirmed 10/100 Mbps. Power connector described as "4-pin locking" — mapped to dc-barrel as closest available connector; the actual connector is a proprietary 4-pin locking DIN type. DisplayPort grade (dp-1.2) inferred from 18 Gbps / 4K60 capability; spec sheet does not explicitly state DP version. USB-C grade (usb-10g) from USB 3.1 spec. The 5-pin audio out and 3-pin/4-pin control euroblock connectors confirmed from specifications table page 97. Relay and trigger connectors confirmed. HDMI inputs labeled 3 and 4 per multiple manual sections (inputs 1 and 2 are USB-C and DP respectively). Product is discontinued.

ports.name: USB-C IN
ports.note: USB Type-C 3.1, 24-pin, AV input via Alternate Mode (DP Alt Mode); also provides USB-C power delivery up to 60W

ports.name: DP IN
ports.note: DisplayPort input, 20-pin female; grade inferred from 18 Gbps / 4K60 support

ports.name: HDMI 3
ports.note: HDMI Type A, 19-pin female; labeled as input 3 on front panel

ports.name: HDMI 4
ports.note: HDMI Type A, 19-pin female; labeled as input 4 on front panel

ports.name: HDMI OUT
ports.note: HDMI Type A, 19-pin female; 18 Gbps, 4K/UHD @ 60 Hz 4:4:4

ports.name: HDBaseT OUT
ports.note: HDBaseT output; connect to compatible HDBaseT receiver (e.g. AT-UHD-EX-100CE-RX-PSE)

ports.name: AUDIO OUT
ports.note: 5-pin captive screw (euroblock), balanced/unbalanced 2-channel analog audio output

ports.name: RS-232
ports.note: 3-pin captive screw (euroblock) for RS-232 serial control

ports.name: RELAY
ports.note: 3-pin captive screw (euroblock), normally open (NO); 48V @ 1A rated; for controlling screens, curtains, etc.

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: 10/100 Mbps Ethernet for network control and web GUI

ports.name: USB (Wi-Fi)
ports.note: 3x USB 2.0 Type-A ports for wireless antenna modules (Miracast/BYOD); not general-purpose host ports

ports.name: DC 24V
ports.note: 4-pin locking DIN connector (proprietary locking type, not a standard barrel jack); 24V DC power input from included external AC adapter
